hero.body: Whether you're an established brand, a starting store-owner or an Amazon / Shopify seller — we manufacture exclusive brass and copper jewellery to your design, with your logo, in your packaging.

process.title: From sketch to shipment in 20 days.
process.body: Here's how we turn your idea into thousands of finished pieces ready for your customers.

cases.title: Three tiers of customisation.
cases.body: From simple logo engraving to fully exclusive designs — pick the level that fits your project.

form.title: Tell us about your project.
form.body: Fill in as much detail as you can — the more we know, the more accurate our quote will be. We respond within 24 hours.
form.ndaNote:
✓ NDA available on request
✓ Existing designs welcome
✓ Reference images / sketches helpful
✓ All enquiries kept confidential
form.name: Your Name *
form.messageHint: Describe your idea, target customers, design references, or any constraints…
form.thankBody: Our OEM team will reach out within 24 hours with next steps and initial pricing for your project.
form.errorMsg: Something went wrong. Please try again or email sales@zhuoheng.com

process_steps.step1Body: Tell us your product idea, target market, MOQ and budget. NDA available.
process_steps.step2Body: Our design team creates 2D / 3D renders. We quote unit cost based on materials.
process_steps.step3Body: We produce a physical sample for your approval. Express-shipped to your office.
process_steps.step4Body: You inspect, request changes, and approve. We refine until it's right.
process_steps.step5Body: Full production run. Quality control at three stages: casting, plating, finishing.
process_steps.step6Body: Custom-branded packaging, your forwarder or our partner: DHL / FedEx / sea freight.

hero.titleB: A Yiwu jewellery manufacturer for the world.
hero.body: ZHUOHENG was founded in 2008 with 17 years of brass and copper jewellery manufacturing experience. From our 3,000 m² modern facility we supply Miniso, Disney, Sanfu, Ling-Li, COBEN and other brands; products ship to the US, UK, Italy, France, the Middle East, India and Japan, with an 18-year stable relationship with Italian buyers.

quality.title: Eco brass · Real-gold plating · 12-month no tarnish
quality.body: Lead-free certified brass and copper. Real-gold electroplating with 0.03 μm coating thickness — guaranteed colour-fast for 12 months under normal wear. Every piece passes 7 production stages and 3 independent QC checks.

clients.title: Brand Clients
clients.subtitle: We've manufactured for these brands. Their quality standards are now baked into every line that comes off our factory floor.
clients.marketsLine: Markets: USA · UK · Italy · France · Middle East · India · Japan

visit.title: Welcome to walk our factory floor.
visit.body: We host buyers and brand teams for in-person factory tours. See our equipment, meet our QC team, and inspect samples on the spot.

legal.privacyIntro: ZHUOHENG ("we") respects your privacy. This policy explains how we collect, use, store and protect your information when you use zhuoheng.com.
legal.privacyBody:
1. Information we collect
From you: name, company, email, phone, country, inquiry contents, customisation requirements.
Automatic: visitor IP, browser type, visit time, pages viewed, referrer URL (for analytics and abuse prevention).

2. How we use it
Only for: (a) responding to your inquiry and quotation; (b) maintaining customer relationships and order follow-up; (c) improving the site and products; (d) preventing fraud and abuse.

3. Sharing
We never sell your personal information. We share only with: email service providers (to send replies), payment processors (when you order), and where legally required.

4. Retention
Inquiry data is kept for 3 years for business follow-up. On your request, we delete it permanently within 30 days.

5. Your rights
You may access, correct, delete, port your data, and withdraw consent. Email sales@zhuoheng.com to exercise these rights.

6. Cookies
We use essential cookies to remember your language/currency preferences and inquiry list. See Cookie Policy.

7. Security
HTTPS site-wide; rate limiting and input validation on inquiry forms; minimised employee access. No internet transmission is 100% secure — please be cautious with sensitive information.

8. International transfers
Our servers are in Asia-Pacific or Europe. Accessing from other regions means your data is transferred to these regions for processing.

9. Updates
This policy may be updated. Material changes will be highlighted on the site.
legal.termsIntro: By accessing and using zhuoheng.com you agree to these terms.
legal.termsBody:
1. Nature of the site
This site is ZHUOHENG's product showcase and inquiry platform. All displayed specifications are reference only; formal pricing is confirmed by email.

2. Inquiry process
Submitting an inquiry does not constitute an order. Orders require written confirmation from both parties (email, contract or PI).

3. Intellectual property
Site content, product photographs and logos are the property of ZHUOHENG and may not be used commercially without written permission. Copyright in OEM-exclusive designs is governed by the applicable contract.

4. User conduct
You may not: upload malicious code, submit fraudulent inquiries, scrape the site for competitive purposes, or attack/abuse the service.

5. Limitation of liability
To the fullest extent permitted by law, ZHUOHENG is not liable for indirect damages arising from use of the site.

6. Disputes
These terms are governed by the laws of the People's Republic of China. Disputes are subject to the jurisdiction of the Yiwu People's Court.
legal.cookiesIntro: We use cookies to improve your browsing experience.
legal.cookiesBody:
Essential cookies
Used to remember language, currency and inquiry list. These cannot be disabled.

Analytics cookies (not currently enabled)
We may add third-party analytics (e.g. Google Analytics) in the future. We will request your consent before enabling.

Management
You can delete cookies in your browser settings. Note: doing so will lose your language preference and inquiry list.

cookieBanner.title: We use cookies
cookieBanner.body: This site uses essential cookies to remember your language preferences and inquiry list. Continuing means you accept.
